narrative: Staff Machine Learning Engineer with 7 years at Paytm, a product‑first firm, based in Kochi. Strong verified skill depth in retrieval‑focused models, highlighted by hands‑on work with QLoRA, BM25 and OpenSearch, pushes the ranking. Their experience with pgvector, Qdrant and LlamaIndex also aligns well with the JD’s need for scalable vector search pipelines. Product‑company background and steady career progression further support fit. However, limited platform engagement and minor credibility concerns temper confidence, and relocation to Pune/Noida may require additional discussion.
